data.title: Kooth Reports 100% Revenue Growth in 2024, Expands US Operations
data.description:
An announcement from Kooth ( (GB:KOO) ) is now available.

Kooth announced a 100% increase in 2024 revenues to £66.7 million, driven by its expansion in the US, particularly through the Soluna program in California, which reached 75,000 youths. The company also secured new pilot contracts in New Jersey and Illinois, and maintained its position as a leading mental health provider in the UK despite economic challenges. With a strong cash position and strategic investments, Kooth is well-positioned to meet growing international demand for digital mental health services in 2025.

More about Kooth

Kooth is a global leader in youth digital mental health, providing accessible and safe spaces for better mental health through a clinically robust platform. It offers therapeutic support, interventions, and a pre-moderated community with access to online coaches and counsellors. Kooth is the largest single access provider for mental health support for under 18s in the UK and has been expanding internationally, focusing on the US market.

YTD Price Performance: -31.68%

Average Trading Volume: 102,500

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £44.38M

data.title: G.U.D. Holdings Announces Change in Substantial Holder Interests
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from G.U.D. Holdings ( (AU:AOV) ).

G.U.D. Holdings has announced a change in the interests of a substantial holder, which involves State Street Corporation and its subsidiaries. The notice highlights the voting power and relevant interests held by State Street Bank and Trust Company, and other associated entities, in the company’s voting securities. This change may impact the company’s governance and influence its strategic decisions, as State Street retains significant control over voting rights and securities management.

data.title: GECC Reports Fiscal 2025 Q2 Results with Focus on Domestic Growth
data.description:
Global Education Communities ( (TSE:GEC) ) has issued an update.

Global Education Communities Corp. reported its fiscal 2025 Q2 financial results, highlighting growth in domestic education and student housing sectors, despite challenges in international education due to Canadian government policies. The company achieved a 9% increase in student housing revenue, while international education revenue declined by 37%. GECC’s strategic focus on operational efficiency and debt reduction resulted in an 11% decrease in finance costs, and the company plans to expand its student housing portfolio amid strong demand.

More about Global Education Communities

Since 1994, Global Education Communities Corp. (GECC) has been a leading player in the Canadian education and student housing sector, serving both domestic and international markets.

data.title: BW LPG Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting Details
data.description:
An announcement from BW LPG Ltd ( (GB:0QIX) ) is now available.

BW LPG Limited has announced the details for its 2025 Annual General Meeting, scheduled for May 15, 2025, in Singapore. This meeting is a key event for stakeholders, providing insights into the company’s strategic direction and operational updates, which could impact its market positioning and stakeholder interests.

More about BW LPG Ltd

BW LPG is the world’s leading owner and operator of LPG vessels, specializing in Very Large Gas Carriers (VLGC) with a carrying capacity exceeding 4 million CBM. With extensive experience in LPG shipping, trading, and terminal infrastructure, BW LPG provides integrated services across the LPG value chain. It is part of BW Group, a global maritime company with a significant presence in shipping, floating infrastructure, and sustainable technologies.

data.title: Makino Milling Announces Correction to Tender Offer Response
data.description:
Makino Milling Machine Co ( (JP:6135) ) has issued an update.

Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. announced a correction to its previous statement regarding its opposition to a tender offer by Nidec Corporation. The correction involves an extension of the response deadline for inquiries to the tender offeror from April 17 to April 22, 2025. This adjustment is part of Makino’s strategy to ensure adequate time for considering third-party proposals, which could impact the company’s strategic decisions and stakeholder interests.

More about Makino Milling Machine Co

Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. operates in the manufacturing industry, specializing in milling machines and related equipment. The company is listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is known for its advanced machining solutions.

data.title: Bass Oil Ltd Announces Successful Operations and Upcoming AGM
data.description:
An announcement from Bass Oil Ltd ( (AU:BAS) ) is now available.

Bass Oil Ltd has successfully completed a flow test at its Kiwi-1 well and maintained production and cash generation from its assets in Indonesia and the Cooper Basin. As the company looks forward to 2025, it remains committed to its growth strategy of becoming a mid-tier oil and gas producer, with significant planning underway to unlock value across its portfolio. The company has announced its 2025 Annual General Meeting, encouraging shareholders to participate and submit proxies in advance.

More about Bass Oil Ltd

Bass Oil Ltd operates in the oil and gas industry, focusing on the exploration and production of oil and gas assets. The company is primarily involved in sustaining oil production across its portfolio, with significant assets in the Cooper Basin and Indonesia.

data.description:
Value Creation Co., Ltd ( (JP:9238) ) has provided an announcement.

Value Creation Co., Ltd. reported its non-consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ending February 28, 2025, showing a 16.4% increase in net sales but a decline in operating and ordinary profits by 29.6% and 21.0%, respectively.
